duel_panel.age_requirement_error: You need to be at least 18 and have your date of birth set on your profile to join duels.
duel_panel.rules: 10% rake · Tiebreak by material → remaining time → sudden death · Post-match anti-fraud analysis
duel_panel.risk_warning_body: The {{fee}} CC stake is debited from your wallet when the match is formed and is not refundable if you lose. The Platform keeps 10% of the pot (rake) even from the winner. Only play with amounts you can afford to lose, and never share your account with anyone.
duel_panel.age_gate_body_has_birthdate: You need to be at least 18 to join duels.
